meta.title: Securely Exporting ICS Data
meta.description:
A primer on how to securely export ICS data for predictive maintenance, billing, or even to allow executives to track Plant performance on their phone or anywhere on the Internet without risking the integrity or availability of the ICS. It also covers emergency remote access.

Dale Peterson goes into detail on GE's Turbine Monitoring in Atlanta which was IIoT before the term was coined.

Recommend playing this at 1.25 speed. It is from a S4xJapan session with simultaneous translation in Japanese so Dale spoke more slowly.
